entities.name: CCAFS MIDLINE SURVEYS
entities.description: Surveys conducted to assess changes at household, village, and organizational levels to evaluate adaptation and mitigation of climate change

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the midline synthesis and surveys were conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental phenomenon that households and villages are adapting to and mitigating

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE UTILIZATION
entities.description: Indicators of how natural resources are used at the village level

entities.name: ORGANIZATIONAL LANDSCAPES
entities.description: Indicators regarding the structure and nature of organizations at the village level

entities.name: INFORMATION NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks providing weather and agricultural information to villages

entities.name: MITIGATION BASELINE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data used to monitor and compare mitigation efforts over time

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD LEVEL
entities.description: The level of analysis focusing on individual households

entities.name: VILLAGE LEVEL
entities.description: The level of analysis focusing on the village community

entities.name: ORGANIZATIONAL LEVEL
entities.description: The level of analysis focusing on local organizations

entities.name: CCAFS BASELINE SURVEYS
entities.description: The initial surveys conducted in 2011 used as a point of comparison for the midline surveys
